justifications.clarity: Prose is clear and direct; equations are introduced with context before display; the new Section 3→4 bridge sentence eliminates the cognitive gap identified in the pedagogy review.
justifications.rigor: The √d_k variance proof is correct; the LSTM cell-state gradient argument (constant error carousel) is precise; citations are given for Bahdanau, Devlin, Hochreiter, Vaswani; BOOK-ONLY flags correctly scope out BiLSTM and RoPE deep-dive content.
justifications.completeness: All 12 core topics are covered (document representations, RNN/LSTM, Bahdanau attention, Transformer, positional encoding, BERT/GPT, LLM landscape, benchmarks, sampling, structured generation, RAG, hallucinations/responsible use); FinanceBench 81%-failure result included.
justifications.pedagogy: 7 measurable learning objectives; financial examples used throughout (earnings calls, 10-K filings, covenants, compliance); hallucination classification now connects directly to practical session Q4; difficulty progresses from mean embedding through production RAG pipelines.
justifications.style: No bold paragraph labels or \paragraph{} used in running prose; benchmarks section rewritten as flowing text; notation is consistent across all 14 sections.
